settings.themeHint: Follow the desktop, or pin light or dark.
settings.closeToTrayHint: The X puts the app in the tray instead of ending it.
settings.lockedWhileRunning: Stop the tuner to change the audio input.
settings.audioDeviceHint: The microphone the tuner listens on. Switching it restarts a running tuner.
settings.humFilterHint: Notch out mains hum the microphone picks up: 50 Hz in Europe, 60 Hz in North America.
settings.clockPpmHint: Corrects a sound card whose sample clock runs fast or slow, in parts per million. Leave it at 0 unless you have measured the offset.
settings.unitHint: Show the deviation in cents or in hertz.
settings.scaleNamingHint: How notes are named. German naming writes H for B natural and B for B flat.
settings.errorReferenceHint: The same measurement, said two ways. Pick the one you have in your hands.
settings.stopAfterLockHint: The figure freezes the moment the tuner is sure of the note, and stays frozen until you move on. For filing: your hand comes off the keyboard and the number is still there.

scaleNamings.cdefgab: C D E F G A B (international, sharps as C#)
scaleNamings.cdefgah: C D E F G A H (German, sharps as C#)
scaleNamings.polish: C Cis D Dis E F Fis G Gis A Ais H (Polish)

settings.toleranceHint: How close counts as in tune when no session is open. A session's own accordion sets its own, tighter or looser, and those win while it is open.

accent.label: Accent
accent.hint: Follow the desktop's own accent, or pick one.

settings.stopAfterLock: Hold the reading once it locks
settings.continuousManual: Keep updating on a pinned note
settings.continuousManualHint: With a note pinned, the reading keeps moving even when the tuner is not certain. For watching a reed come into tune as you file it.
settings.closeToTray: Closing the window keeps it running

report.name: Workshop name
report.nameHint: Printed at the head of a card, when you ask for a letterhead at export.
report.logoHint: Embedded in the card itself, so it survives being emailed and printed from anywhere.
